hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.md|*.mdx|*.html|*.yaml|*.yml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; dir=$(dirname "$f"); root=$(cd "$dir" && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -x "$root/node_modules/.bin/prettier" ] && "$root/node_modules/.bin/prettier" --write "$f"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) [ -x "$root/node_modules/.bin/eslint" ] && "$root/node_modules/.bin/eslint" --fix "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
